rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for bindings.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in valid AADL scopes matching component type or implementation.
Generated AGREE expressions must preserve type consistency and avoid package-qualified identifiers not in scope.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference visible component ports or declared helpers only.
Use standard AGREE logical operators and syntax for contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Stateful equations use `name : type = value -> pre(name) + step` pattern.
Branching logic uses nested `if ... then ... else` expressions.
Constants and equations are declared with `const name : type = value;` and `eq name : type = expression;`.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
Do not assign Boolean comparison results to numeric variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
